steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage contrasts finding hominins in Asia with seeking older Ediacaran organisms elsewhere—the “even older” combined with “must look elsewhere” signals that the blank must explain why Mistaken Point specifically contains these older specimens.

steps.title: Match the causal explanation
steps.content:
Choice C alone establishes the logical reason: if Mistaken Point's formation is from an earlier geological period, it would contain organisms from that earlier period.

The other choices either contradict the passage, describe unrelated patterns, or misidentify what species are at each site.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
